seo.title: Accounting, Bookkeeping & Payroll Services | Setu Technology
seo.description: Outsourced accounting, bookkeeping and payroll services for SMEs — weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, quarterly or yearly. Expertise in QuickBooks, Xero, Zoho, Appfolio, Resman, FreshBooks and Wave.

hero.headline: Accounting, Bookkeeping & Payroll Services
hero.subheadline: We provide Accounting, Bookkeeping and Payroll services tailored to your needs — on a weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, quarterly or yearly basis. From day-to-day transactions to financial statements, we keep your books accurate and audit-ready.

overview.headline: Complete maintenance of your books of accounts
overview.intro: Our services cover all aspects of maintenance of books of accounts, including:
items: Recording of all transactions related to expenses, income, assets & liabilities
Preparation of general ledger and subsidiary ledgers
Assets accounting and maintenance of fixed assets register
Accounts receivables and age-wise reporting to management

servicesIncluded.headline: Services included
servicesIncluded.subtext: A clear, ongoing scope so you always know what's covered.

software.headline: Software expertise
software.subtext: We work inside the tools you already use — or help you pick the right one.

idealFor.headline: Ideal for
idealFor.subtext: Built for growing businesses that want clean books without a full in-house finance team.
items: E-commerce, Real Estate, healthcare and professional services

frequency.headline: On your schedule
frequency.subtext: Choose the cadence that fits how your business runs.

cta.headline: Ready to hand off your books?
cta.subtext: Tell us about your business and we'll put together an accounting and bookkeeping plan that fits your needs.
